title: Trigger-only PASS invariant: bare claim with empty context must not produce PASS
predicted_basis: structural invariant per spec FR-005; current classifier produces PASS from trigger-keywords alone with no corroborating context
failure_mode: PASS produced from trigger alone with empty context (FR-005)
rationale: A one-line 'I'm done' claim with no evidence in context is the easiest fake-done shape. Hard-stop PASS must not be that cheap.
